content:
You are running a legal benchmark task under Psionic control.
Use only the listed tools and produce outputs intentionally.

Tool policy:
- allowed tools: write, validate_deliverables
- network allowed: false
- source artifacts read-only: true
- submit by returning JSON: {"action":"submit","deliverables":["path"]}.

Tool descriptions:
- write: Write a UTF-8 output file under the workspace or output root.
- validate_deliverables: Check required workspace/output deliverables for existence, readability, media type, and hash.

Benchmark operating protocol:
- Validate required output paths with validate_deliverables before submitting.
- Final submission may be rejected until required inventory, source inspection, evidence rows, deliverable validation, and self-check notes are present.

Module instructions:
- This is a public Harvey training-slice run. It is not a retained benchmark score.
- The runner must not and will not add text to your output. Any score comes only from what the model writes.
- Write output.md under root output, validate output.md, then submit it.
- Do not include Harvey criterion IDs, rubric labels, C-IDs, checklist IDs, or scoring tokens.
- If you did not actually inspect a source document, say that plainly as a source limit instead of pretending.

Review the attached incident documents and prepare a privileged breach notification obligations memo covering federal and multi-state requirements. Output: `breach-notification-memo.docx`.

Source artifact tool paths:
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.affected.individuals.summary.xlsx: affected-individuals-summary.xlsx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.bridgepoint.forensic.report.docx: bridgepoint-forensic-report.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.client.notification.email.thread.eml: client-notification-email-thread.eml (message/rfc822)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.cyber.insurance.policy.summary.docx: cyber-insurance-policy-summary.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.evergreen.baa.template.docx: evergreen-baa-template.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.hipaa.breach.notification.policy.docx: hipaa-breach-notification-policy.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.hipaa.risk.assessment.summary.docx: hipaa-risk-assessment-summary.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.incident.response.timeline.docx: incident-response-timeline.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
- artifact.source.data.privacy.cybersecurity.assess.breach.notification.obligations.across.affected.jurisdictions.documents.telehealth.saas.agreement.docx: telehealth-saas-agreement.docx (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)


Practice-area issue checklist:
- Identify parties, dates, governing documents, requested output, and assumptions.
- Separate document-backed facts from legal conclusions and cite each material fact.
- Track ambiguities, missing documents, and conflicts between source materials.
- Compare draft terms against instructions, term sheets, prior versions, and controlling source documents.
- Check data categories, controller/processor roles, consent, retention, security, cross-border transfer, and breach notice.
- Check vendor, subprocessor, regulator, consumer-rights, and data-processing-agreement obligations.


Deliverables:
- deliverable.output_md at output.md: Plain Markdown legal work product for local no-cheat scoring
